name.description: Specifies the name for the dynamic table, must be unique for the schema in which the dynamic table is created

kind.description: Specifies the dynamic table type, permanent (default) or transient.

refresh_mode.description: Specifies the refresh type for the dynamic table

initialize.description: Specifies the behavior of the initial refresh of the dynamic table

warehouse.description: Specifies the name of the warehouse that provides the compute resources for refreshing the dynamic table

cluster_by.description: Specifies one or more columns or column expressions in the dynamic table as the clustering key

query.description: Specifies the query whose results the dynamic table should contain

data_retention_time_in_days.description: Specifies the retention period for the dynamic table so that Time Travel actions (SELECT, CLONE) can be performed on historical data in the dynamic table

max_data_extension_time_in_days.description: Specifies the retention period for the dynamic table so that Time Travel actions (SELECT, CLONE) can be performed on historical data in the dynamic table

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the dynamic table.

created_on.description: Date and time when the dynamic table was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the dynamic table is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the dynamic table is stored

rows.description: Number of rows in the dynamic table.

bytes.description: Number of bytes that will be scanned if the entire table is scanned in a query. Note that this number may be different than the number of actual physical bytes stored on-disk for the table

automatic_clustering.description: If Automatic Clustering is enabled for your account, specifies whether it is explicitly enabled or disabled for the dynamic table.

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the object.

budget.description: Name of the budget if the object is monitored by a budget
